blocks.title: 📘 PRESENT SIMPLE & FREQUENCY
blocks.intro: Usamos el present simple para rutinas y cosas que pasan siempre. Repasa y luego practica con varios ejercicios.

cells.body:
I / you / we / they work
he / she / it works (+s)

Do you work?
Does she work?
What time do you start?

She works here.
She work here.
He doesn't work. (no "doesn't works")

blocks.ladderLabel: Adverbios de frecuencia — van antes del verbo: I always check emails.
blocks.note: Cómo funciona: esta lección mezcla completar 📝, escucha 🎧 y ordenar 🧩. Hacé el ✓ CHECK en cada ejercicio.

blocks.title: ★ MARCOS'S FIRST WEEK
blocks.intro: Marcos empieza en un equipo de trabajo remoto. Su jefa, Sofia, le explica la rutina. Practica las formas y después escucha.

cast.sp: la team lead
el nuevo developer

blocks.title: COMPLETÁ EN PRESENTE
blocks.intro: Elige la forma correcta del present simple.

items.q: Marcos always ___ a coffee in the morning.
She is ___ late for the meeting. (0%)

blocks.title: AUDIO 1 · THE WELCOME CALL
blocks.desc: Sofia le da la bienvenida a Marcos y le explica la rutina del equipo.
blocks.speakers: 🗣 Sofia + Marcos

questions.q: What time does the team usually start?
What does Sofia always do first?

speaking.prompt: Describe Sofia's morning routine. Use always and usually.
speaking.starter: She usually starts at nine o'clock, and she always checks…

transcript.html: Hi Marcos, welcome to the team! How are you today?
Hi Sofia, thank you! I'm great, but a little nervous. It's my first day.
Don't worry. We work remotely, so we have a simple routine.
What time does the team start?
We usually start at nine. I always check my emails first, then we have a short meeting.
And when do you take a break?
I usually take a break at eleven, and we have lunch at one. I often write reports in the afternoon.
I normally finish at five, but I never work on weekends. Family time!

blocks.title: ORDENÁ LA FRASE
blocks.intro: Toca las palabras para formar la frase.

blocks.title: AUDIO 2 · MARCOS'S DAY
blocks.desc: Marcos describe su propio día. Vive en otra zona horaria.

questions.q: What does Marcos always need in the morning?
When does Marcos often work on the website?
options: In the morning, because it's quiet

speaking.prompt: What is Marcos's morning routine? Tell it in 2–3 sentences.
speaking.starter: He usually wakes up at seven, has breakfast and a coffee, and then…

transcript.html: Hi everyone, I'm Marcos, the new developer. I usually wake up at seven. First, I have breakfast and drink a big coffee. I always need coffee! Then I log on at eight thirty. I often work on the website in the morning, because it's quiet. I usually have lunch at one. I rarely work late, but on busy days I finish at six. I never forget to log off!

blocks.title: ✍️ MY DAILY ROUTINE
blocks.intro: Describe tu día normal (5–6 frases) en present simple:
checklist: Usa I + verbo (I wake up, I start…)
Usa 3 adverbios de frecuencia (always / usually / often / sometimes / never)
blocks.example: I usually wake up at seven o'clock. I always have a coffee before work. I start at nine and I often check my emails first. My colleague Ana usually works in the afternoon. I never work on Sundays.
blocks.hw: Escribe tu rutina y graba un audio leyéndola. Envíame ambos por WhatsApp y lo corregimos.
